heading: Omitted
label: 610e Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , , which authorized the assignment of income by the Swinomish Indian Tribal Community, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 90–534, § 782 Stat. 884Sept. 28, 1968
